scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix WakeSafeMobile
scripts.dev:local: npm run redis:up && npm run dev:local:prepare && concurrently -k -n backend,ml1,ml2 -c green,blue,magenta "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"$env:ENV_PROFILE='local'; npm run dev --prefix server\"" "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"Set-Location 'ml1-service'; ..\\.venv-ml\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload\"" "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"Set-Location 'ml2-service'; ..\\.venv-ml\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload\""
scripts.dev:local:all: npm run redis:up && npm run dev:local:prepare && concurrently -k -n backend,ml1,ml2,mobile -c green,blue,magenta,cyan "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"$env:ENV_PROFILE='local'; npm run dev --prefix server\"" "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"Set-Location 'ml1-service'; ..\\.venv-ml\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload\"" "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"Set-Location 'ml2-service'; ..\\.venv-ml\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload\"" "npm run start --prefix WakeSafeMobile"
